_comment: Frozen SHA-256 of the core BT engine and its static-equivalence guard. Written at completion of AI-loop prep task #1 (2026-07-18). Phase 0 evaluate_candidate.py must verify these at startup and refuse to run on mismatch (read-only protection, design sec 7.1/7.5). Any human-side engine change must re-run test_grid_floatstop_static.py and update this file in the same commit.
